After_1M_2M board 305: Play the ♣Q — third hand high, but from touching honours play the lower: it wins as cheaply as the ♣K and tells partner you hold it.
After_Opp_Overcalls board 171: Partner led low and dummy followed low, so it is up to you — play the ♣J, third hand high. Don't duck: your highest card makes declarer spend an honour to win.
After_1M_2M board 414: Play the ♦A — your top card, third hand high: the ace wins the trick. A small card hands declarer a free trick.
After_1M_2M board 366: Play the ♣Q — third hand high: the queen wins, or drives out a higher honour. Play low and declarer scores a cheap trick.
After_1M_2M board 237: From your ♦J-10 play the lower, the ♦10: equal cards win equally, so play the cheaper and keep the ♦J working.
After_1M_2M board 150: Play the ♦10, the lower of your touching honours: it does the ♦J's job and shows partner you hold the ♦J above it.
